matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) (FTO adiposity association marker)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a FTO adiposity and RNA-modification review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context and Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

This specific marker is curated as FTO adiposity association marker. rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) is curated as a FTO marker for Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the FTO prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.
